subcodes.first_line: O Nasrullah! Say: Praise be unto Thee, O my God, inasmuch as Thou hast given me to drink of the Kawthar of Thy knowledge and hast enabled me to turn unto Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا نصرالله قل لک الحمد یا الهی بما سقیتنی کوثر عرفانک و ایدتنی علی الاقبال
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @knowledge; recognition of God
